mapper.sql: id, product_code, product_name, category, unit, order_num, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_product WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_product (product_code, product_name, category, unit, order_num, status, remark, create_by) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_product
product_name = #{productName}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_product SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
